top_signals.title: Ethereum Layer 2 Zero Network to wind down, joining string of protocols shuttering operations
top_signals.summary: Resources will be redirected to focus on growing Zerion's API and wallet service, the team said in a Thursday statement.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
